step_rationale: Fibrinolytic pathway regulation; plasmin inhibition and thrombus turnover.
mechanism: PAI-2 regulates fibrinolysis by inhibiting tissue plasminogen activator and urokinase, modulating thrombus stabilization and resolution.

references.title: The Effect of Protease-Activated Receptor-1 (PAR-1) Inhibition on Endothelial-Related Biomarkers in Patients with Coronary Artery Disease.
